title: cyclosorus tetragonus
intro: Cyclosorus tetragonus is a species of fern, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus tetragonus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which are said to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
